name: Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the oil in a blender with the center of the lid removed or in a food processor fitted with a plastic blade.
2. Blend or process for 2 minutes.
3. Slowly pour the oil through a thin stream over the top or down the feed tube until it is fully incorporated.
4. Blend or process for an additional 30 seconds.
